name: Italian Coconut Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar and 1/4 lb butter in a large bowl.
2. Add egg yolks and shortening to the mixture; beat until well combined.
3. Stir in flour, baking soda, buttermilk, chopped pecans, and 1 tsp vanilla.
4. Mix in the beaten egg whites until just blended.
5. Pour batter into three cake pans coated with shortening and dusted with flour.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. For icing, cream together 1/4 lb butter, cream cheese, powdered sugar, and 1 tsp vanilla in another bowl.
8. Frost only the top and center of each cake; leave the sides plain.
9. Sprinkle toasted coconut over the top if desired before serving.
